title: TPA-TP
description: A simple TPA module, just like the ones on the market, but the advantage is that it doesn't require other prerequisite mods.
body:
A simple TPA module, similar to those on the market, but the advantage is that it has no other prerequisite modules.  

Command List:  
/tpa [player name] (send a teleport request),  
/tpaccept (accept a teleport request),  
/tpadeny (deny a teleport request),  
/back (teleport to the death location),  
/tpahere [player name] (request the player to teleport to you).
